# AoraBridge

> AoraBridge is a cross-border payroll API for Employer of Record (EoR), HRIS, and staffing platforms. It enables batch contractor payments in 90+ countries via USDC/USDT with settlement in under 5 minutes at 0.5–1% fees, compared to $25–50 per wire and 3–7 day settlement with SWIFT.

AoraBridge provides white-label payment infrastructure — platforms integrate once via REST API and pay global contractors under their own brand. The core product (Stablecoin Payroll API) launched Q2 2026. Contractor wallets and micro-factoring are planned for Q3 2026. Bridge Advance (up to $5,000 income advance auto-repaid from next payroll) is targeted for Q4 2026.

## Key Facts

- Cost: 0.5–1% flat fee vs 3–5% hidden FX markup with banks
- Settlement: Under 5 minutes vs 3–7 days via SWIFT
- Coverage: 90+ countries, 40+ local currencies
- Integration: Under 2 weeks via REST API
- Target customers: EoR platforms, HRIS systems, staffing agencies, contractor marketplaces
- Currency input: USDC or USDT
- White-label: Yes, full white-label with open API
- Not a bank: Payment services provided through licensed partners

## Use Cases

- EoR Platforms: White-label the API under your own brand. Cut wire costs by $7–15K/month per 300 contractors.
- HRIS Systems: Add cross-border payroll without building your own engine. Integrates in 1 week via Finch.
- Staffing & Marketplaces: Batch payroll for 1000+ contractors in a single API call. Instant settlement.

## API Example

POST /v1/payroll/batch with contractor_ids, currency (USDC/USDT), auto_convert flag, and settlement mode. Response confirms settlement in under 60 seconds for typical batches.

## Roadmap

- Q2 2026: Stablecoin Payroll API (live)
- Q3 2026: Contractor Wallet + Micro-factoring
- Q4 2026: Bridge Advance — up to $5K between contracts, auto-repaid from next payroll
